JR102380

Established in 2021, Independence Pet Holdings is a corporate holding company that manages a diverse and broad portfolio of modern pet health brands and services, including insurance, pet education, lost recovery services, and more throughout North America.

 

We believe pet insurance is more than a financial product and build solutions to simplify the pet parenting journey and help improve the well-being of pets. As a leading authority in the pet category, we operate with a full stack of resources, capital, and services to support pet parents. Our multi-brand and omni-channel approach include our own insurance carrier, insurance brands and partner brands. 

As a Product Analyst at Independence Pet Holdings, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the world of pet insurance. You will identify data and market trends and business opportunities to enhance and innovate our pet insurance products.

Working closely with the Product Manager, you will utilize your problem solving and analytical skills to present data-driven insights to inform key decisions and ensure our pet insurance offerings remain competitive and customer-centric.

You will be responsible for providing performance analytics for the carrier and our Managing General Agencies focusing on profitable growth, and product plans that align with strategic needs.

Are you ready to embark on a rewarding career where you can make a real difference? Join our team and let us create a brighter future for pets everywhere.

 

Key Responsibilities

Analyzes product and portfolio P&L performance, identifies growth opportunities, assesses new product metrics, and evaluates initiatives to uncover issues. Provides strategic recommendations and impleme
